name: fintrack
description: Financial Tracker - Track your finances together

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=fintrack-client && npm run build --workspace=fintrack-server
scripts.install: npm install && cd fintrack-client && npm install && cd ../fintrack-server && npm install
scripts.monorepo: npm run build:client && npm run build:server && cp -r fintrack-client/dist fintrack-server/client
